2604.06520.title: Database Querying under Missing Values Governed by Missingness Mechanisms
2604.06520.paper_summary: We address the problems of giving a semantics to- and doing query answering (QA) on a relational database (RDB) that has missing values (MVs). The causes for the latter are governed by a Missingness Mechanism that is modelled as a Bayesian Network, which represents a Missingness Graph (MG) and involves the DB attributes. Our approach considerable departs from the treatment of RDBs with NULL (values). The MG together with the observed DB allow to build a block-independent probabilistic DB, on which basis we propose two QA techniques that jointly capture probabilistic uncertainty and statistical plausibility of the implicit imputation of MVs. We obtain complexity results that characterize the computational feasibility of those approaches.
2604.06520.paper_summary_zh: 我們探討了為具有缺失值（MVs）的關聯數據庫（RDB）提供語義以及進行查詢回答（QA）所面臨的問題。後者的原因受缺失機制的控制，該機制被建模為貝葉斯網絡，表示為缺失圖（MG），並涉及數據庫屬性。我們的方法在處理具有NULL（值）的RDB時有顯著不同。MG與觀察到的數據庫結合，允許構建一個區塊獨立的概率數據庫，基於此我們提出了兩種QA技術，這些技術共同捕捉了缺失值隱含插補的概率不確定性和統計合理性。我們獲得了複雜度結果，這些結果表徵了這些方法的計算可行性。
2604.06520.author: Leopoldo Bertossi et.al.
2604.06520.authors: Leopoldo Bertossi, Farouk Toumani, Maxime Buron
